# Business Requirements Document

## 1. Background
Context, business drivers, and problem statement.

## 2. Objectives and Success Criteria
- Objective 1
- Success metric(s)

## 3. Stakeholders
Roles, responsibilities, RACI.

## 4. Key Business Requirements
| ID | Requirement | Priority | Owner |
|-----|-------------|----------|-------|
| BR-001 | ... | High | Product Team |

## 5. Constraints & Assumptions

## 6. Acceptance Criteria
List conditions for acceptance for each requirement.

## 7. Dependencies
External systems, regulations, or other projects.

## 8. Traceability
Link BR IDs to FRD/Design/API artifacts (fill after FRD created).
